rawAssistant: Charm hoops are a nice touch, aren't they? While I've seen many a traveler swear by their charm's effectiveness, I'm not one to take such claims at face value. Road grit and grime can be quite stubborn, after all. Still, having a bit of good fortune on your side never hurts – especially when venturing into the unpredictable landscape of Hollowfen.
